raw_consumer_statement:
On XX/XX/year>, I made a purchase of {$4800.00} using my Citibank credit card. The package was marked as delivered on XX/XX/year>, but I did not receive it. I contacted the merchant immediately and confirmed non-receipt. 

The merchant initiated an investigation with the carrier and later instructed me on XX/XX/year> that they could not proceed with their claim process unless my credit card dispute was withdrawn. 

Based on this instruction, I withdrew my dispute on XX/XX/year> and completed all requested documentation, including claim forms and supporting materials. 

On XX/XX/year>, the merchant confirmed they would submit the information to their claims department and that funds would be released upon completion of the process. 

I followed up multiple times throughout XX/XX/year> requesting updates and an estimated timeline for the refund. The merchant continued to indicate that the process was ongoing but did not provide a resolution or issue any refund. 

Despite my full cooperation and compliance with their requirements, I never received the promised refund. 

I then contacted Citibank to request that they open a new dispute based on the merchants failure to honor the refund agreement. Citibank refused, stating that chargeback rights had expired after I withdrew my original dispute. 

This is a separate issue from the original dispute. I withdrew my dispute only because the merchant required it in order to proceed with the refund process. The merchant did not fulfill their obligation, and Citibank has declined to review or assist despite this evidence. I would not have withdrawn my dispute if the merchant had not explicitly required it in order to proceed with their claim process. 

I am requesting that Citibank review this matter and provide a resolution, including a credit for the transaction amount and any associated interest charges.
